examples: I didn't want to upset my husband or my daughter unnecessarily.
She insists that it's exposing workers to unnecessarily high doses of radiation.
A patient's silence should not be interrupted too early or allowed to go on unnecessarily.
Back then, he seemed like such a sweet man to me, and this felt unnecessarily cruel.
Airbus says air passengers already spend more than 500 million hours in the air unnecessarily every year.
